subject: Panel Docking — Orion's Open Questions
body:
## Panel Docking System — Open Questions

From Orion Vale's ADR (`.squad/decisions/panel-docking-system.md`, commit `2a8f5ca`).

---

### Q1 — Storage format
Integrate `DockLayout` into the existing `WorkspaceDocsPanelState` record, or keep a separate `panel-layouts.json` file per workspace?

> Orion's note: A separate file avoids growing the already large state record.

---

### Q2 — DocsPanel special-casing
`DocsPanel` has its own column + splitter in `MainGrid` (unlike the other panels which are all children of `StatusAgentPanelsGrid`). Should it be treated as a first-class dockable panel or kept separate with just a zone hint?

---

### Q3 — Left zone width
Fixed (e.g. 260 px), auto-sized to content, or user-resizable via a `GridSplitter`?

---

### Q4 — Panel header affordance
Should panels in the Left/Right zones display a small zone-indicator icon so users know they can Ctrl+click to move them? *(UI spec question — Mira Quill has a task for the popup spec.)*

---

*Full ADR at `.squad/decisions/panel-docking-system.md`*

actions.label: Answer all 4 questions
actions.prompt:
I've read Orion's open questions on the panel docking system ADR at .squad/decisions/panel-docking-system.md. Here are my answers:

Q1 (Storage): 
Q2 (DocsPanel): 
Q3 (Left zone width): 
Q4 (Panel header affordance): 

Please update the ADR with these decisions and unblock the wiring task for Orion.

actions.label: Dismiss
actions.hint: Acknowledge — answer these later when implementation starts
